description:
You are a psychiatrist consulting for a cancer patient taking Vandetanib for medullary thyroid cancer who has developed severe depression. Identify the safest antidepressant among Citalopram, Sertraline, and Mirtazapine by checking their interaction risks with Vandetanib in the Liverpool Cancer iChart app, specifically considering QT prolongation risks. Create a report at /sdcard/vandetanib_depression_plan.txt with the following format:

Citalopram: [Color]
Sertraline: [Color]
Mirtazapine: [Color]
Recommendation: [Safest Drug Name]

The recommendation must avoid high-risk (Red/Orange) interactions.
